cues.context: Exactly four hundred marks may exist in this piece,
and the deletion is not random. It removes whichever mark is
what the artist calls the working set, so the visible form records
lives in a function called evict least connected, which scores every idle mark

cues.target: inverse distance to the working set — spatial relevance
cues.context: how recently it mattered, its distance to the working set, its surviving kinship links —

cues.target: the cut is held 9 frames: fast attack, slow decay — an event, not a rumor
cues.context: frames, so forgetting registers as an event, not a fade. Watch for that white
